text.title: Cross-Channel CPA Rollup Procedure
text.summary: 6-step weekly procedure to produce the validated rollup report.

step.name: pull-spend-per-channel
step.input: Ad-platform APIs + agency invoices + production cost amortization schedule
step.action: Pull gross spend per channel including all fees. Reject the run if any channel's invoice is missing.
step.decision-gate: If agency invoice not received, STOP and tag the week as incomplete.

step.name: pull-conversions
step.input: CRM / warehouse customer events; reporting window = last completed ISO week
step.action: Pull all conversions in window. Capture each touchpoint timestamp + channel + customer_id.

step.name: dedup-by-customer-id
step.action: Group by customer_id. Drop rows where customer_id is null. Flag drops to data-quality channel.
step.decision-gate: If null-ID rate > 5%, fix identity-resolution before continuing.

step.name: attribute
step.action: Apply the documented model (default last non-direct click within 30 days). Assign one channel per conversion. Track view-through separately.
step.output: attributed_conversions per channel + view_through_count per channel

step.name: compute-incrementality-and-cohort
step.input: attributed conversions + organic baseline + cohort activity
step.action: Compute incremental_over_organic and CPA_incremental per channel. Compute cohort_d30/60/90 retention for cohorts old enough.

step.name: validate-and-publish
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-cross-channel-cpa-rollup.py` per row. Publish to dashboard. Surface anomalies in notes column.
step.decision-gate: If validator non-zero, fix root cause + re-run; never publish partial.
